scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend-api && npm install
scripts.install:ai: cd backend-ai && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k -n web,api,ai -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend-api" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend-api
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend-api && npm run test -w frontend
